Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 164 

ORGANIZATION_MARKETING_NAME 

LABEL: Plan Organization Marketing Name 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the plan sponsor's marketing name for the organization. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 150 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: text description 

COMMENT: This is the name of the organization that is used for marketing materials. It may be associated with 
multiple
